_comment: OPTIONAL. Copy to calendar.json only if you want events beyond the FOMC.
_comment2: FOMC dates are scraped automatically from federalreserve.gov by `ingest --kind events` — you do NOT need to list them here.
_comment3: This file is for what cannot be scraped: RBI MPC dates (the RBI's page serves no dates in its HTML), CPI releases, earnings dates.
_comment4: Replace the EXAMPLE entries with real dates from rbi.org.in / bls.gov. The engine ships none of its own: a wrong date dampens confidence on the wrong day, which is worse than no calendar at all.
_comment5: region: us | in | global.  importance: high | medium | low.
name: EXAMPLE - replace me - RBI MPC decision
EXAMPLE - replace me - US CPI release
